title: Nebraska's heated school voucher debate is back on the ballot.
shortDescription: Voters in the Cornhusker State will get another chance to vote on school vouchers in November.

title: GOP rising star Sen. Katie Britt is a long shot Trump VP pick
shortDescription: Sen. Katie Britt, R-Ala., is no stranger to controversy. The buzz she generates is enough to earn her a spot in the Trump VP conversation.

title: 'I nearly fell asleep on stage': Biden blames travel for debate debacle
shortDescription: President Biden blamed recent travels overseas for his rough debate, even though he returned to the US 12 days before taking the stage against Trump.

title: Tammy Baldwin won't appear with Joe Biden during Wisconsin visit
shortDescription: Tammy Baldwin will be in northeastern Wisconsin on a pre-planned statewide tour when Joe Biden campaigns in Madison on Friday.

title: These Republicans are pleading with Democrats to take action after disastrous debate
shortDescription: Members of the never-Trump movement are frustrated with the Biden campaign's debate response.

title: Gen Z voters share their feelings on Biden and Trump
shortDescription: USA TODAY spoke with young voters from across America to understand their feelings about the choices in the upcoming presidential election.

title: Trump boosts post calling for a military tribunal for Liz Cheney
shortDescription: Donald Trump reposted a post on Truth Social that called for a military tribunal for former Wyoming representative, Liz Cheney.

title: This clip of Biden referencing resigning isn't new | Fact check
shortDescription: The video is from 2020 and has nothing to do with the 2024 presidential race or the aftermath of the June 27 debate.

title: Giuliani disbarred for lies about 2020 election
shortDescription: Rudy Giuliani lost his New York law license after a state appeals court found he had lied in arguing that the 2020 presidential election was stolen.

title: Jill Biden on cover of Vogue after husband's disastrous debate
shortDescription: Jill Biden is defending President Joe Biden, both on the campaign trail, and in an interview with Vogue magazine.

title: OnPolitics: Can Democrats drop Joe Biden?
shortDescription: After Biden and Trump's presidential debate, some Democrats have considered replacing the president as their presumptive nominee.

title: With Virginia's Fifth District election certified, recount is next
shortDescription: The results were officially certified on Tuesday as constituents and candidates wait for a costly recount in a race involving two Trump allies.

title: Trump stays quiet as Biden remains defiant on calls to leave race
shortDescription: The Republican nominee and his team are also making it clear they expect Biden to remain their Democratic opponent on Election Day.

title: Trump's NY sentencing delayed to Sept. 18 after SCOTUS ruling
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump's New York criminal sentencing has been delayed to Sept. 18 after the Supreme Court's presidential immunity ruling.

title: Panama president vows migrant crackdown - with Biden's help
shortDescription: Last year, a record 520,000 migrants risked life and limb to be smuggled across the Darien Gap, a dense jungle on Panama's border with Colombia.

title: Bernstein: Sources raised concerns about Biden’s decline for past year
shortDescription: “The people I’ve talked to have all been to Ron Klain in the last year to say, ‘we have a problem,’” Bernstein told CNN's Anderson Cooper.

title: Footage of Trump plane from flight simulation video game | Fact check
shortDescription: The video is from a flight simulation video game. It doesn't show actual footage of Trump's plane.

title: How could Democrats and Republicans replace a presidential candidate?
shortDescription: Political parties can replace the candidate on the U.S. presidential ticket, but it's not easy.

title: Tim Ryan says Harris should replace Biden as 2024 Democratic nominee
shortDescription: Former Ohio congressman says Vice President Kamala Harris should replace President Joe Biden at the top of the Democratic ticket.

title: Trump says SCOTUS ruling delivered 'high level spanking' to Jack Smith
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump claimed that the Supreme Court’s ruling on immunity delivered a “high level spanking” to special counsel Jack Smith.

title: GOP lawmaker charged after gun found in her luggage at airport
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Victoria Spartz was charged with a weapons violation Friday.

title: Texas Democrat is first to call for Joe Biden to step aside
shortDescription: Texas Rep. Lloyd Doggett, a Democrat, said President Joe Biden 'must not deliver us to Trump in 2024.'

title: Biden to meet Wednesday with Democratic governors amid campaign crisis
shortDescription: Democratic governors called for the meeting with the White House as concerns grow over Biden leaving the 2024 presidential race.

title: Trump attorney says fake elector scheme falls under 'official acts'
shortDescription: In a CNN interview, Trump attorney Will Scharf said he believes that the Supreme Court ruling should result in Trump’s conviction being overturned.

title: Will Democrats replace Biden? What it would take.
shortDescription: The president has committed to staying in the 2024 race, but it hasn't stopped speculation about Democrats going with another nominee.

title: Giuliani disbarred after court found he lied about 2020 election
shortDescription: Rudy Giuliani lost his New York law license after a state appeals court found he had lied in arguing that the 2020 presidential election was stolen.

title: Trump NY hush money sentencing delayed after SCOTUS ruling
shortDescription: Trump's lawyers will formally ask NY Judge Juan Merchan to toss his conviction after a Supreme Court ruling on presidential immunity.
